chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2563 of 2023 Muhammad Shehzad Yousuf Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.12309/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 31.05.2023 Rana Sakhawat Ali for petitioner. -.-.- Mr. Khalid Rajpar Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents/departments, which is taken on record. The issue of fine is pending adjudication before Customs Appellate Tribunal and the petitioner seeks release of consignment after securing it with the Nazir of this Court. In substance it is not opposed by learned counsel for respondents. We, therefore, deem it appropriate to order that the goods could only be released after securing the amount/fine adjudged in the order challenged before the Appellate Tribunal by way of bank guarantee/pay order with the Nazir of this Court. On such security being furnished, a certificate be issued and the goods be released accordingly on its presentation. The fate of the amount secured shall be subject to the outcome of the appeal before Appellate Tribunal. By consent petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
